extensionAttributes.valueString: cancer du poumon non à petites cellules
Veiligheid gemeten middels de frequentie van bijwerking en serieuze bijwerkingen [Tijdsbestek: ongeveer 510 dagen]
la sécurité, mesurée par le taux d'événements indésirables et d'événements indésirables graves [Laps de Times: 510 jours]
les travaux d'événements indésirables ont lieu depuis 510 jours

endpoints.name: END1
endpoints.text: Safety as measured by the rate of adverse events, and serious adverse events [Time Frame: Approximately 510 days]

endpoints.name: END3
endpoints.text: Efficacy as measured by tumor assessment [Time Frame: Assessed from the start of treatment (ay 1) to the end of treatment (week 60) and for 90 days in follow-up]

endpoints.name: END4
endpoints.text: The maximum observed serum concentration (Cmax) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END5
endpoints.text: The time of maximum observed serum concentration (Tmax) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END6
endpoints.text: Area under the serum concentration-time curve in one dosing interval [AUC(TAU)] of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END7
endpoints.text: Area under the serum concentration-time curve from time zero extrapolated to infinite time [AUC(INF)] of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END8
endpoints.text: Apparent total body clearance (CL) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END9
endpoints.text: Apparent total body clearance (CL) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END10
endpoints.text: Apparent volume of distribution at steady state (Vss) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END12
endpoints.text: Trough observed serum concentration (Cmin) of BMS-986015 and Ipilimumab

endpoints.name: END13
endpoints.text: Immunogenicity as measured by the incidence of Ipilimumab and anti-Killer cell immunoglobulin-like receptor (KIR) (BMS-986015) anti-drug antibodies (ADA)

extensionAttributes.valueString: Safety studie met BMS-986015 (Anti-KIR) in combinatie met Ipilimumab in patienten met een gespecificeerde gevorderde tumor
Studie naar een behandeling van een gevorderde tumor met een nieuwe medicatie BMS-986015 in combinatie met een bestaande medicatie Ipilimumab
Étude de tolérance du BMS-986015 (anti-KIR) en combinaison avec l'ipilimumab chez des sujets atteints de tumeurs avancées sélectionnées.
Étude sur le traitement d'une tumeur avancée

titles.text: Safety Study of BMS-986015 (Anti-KIR) in Combination With Ipilimumab in Subjects With Selected Advanced Tumor
A Phase 1 Study of BMS-986015, an Anti-KIR Monoclonal Antibody, Administered With Ipilimumab, an Anti-CTLA4 Monoclonal Antibody, in Subjects With Select Advanced Solid Tumors

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN01
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Histologic confirmation of one of the following solid tumors that is advanced (unresectable or metastatic) for dose escalation or cohort expansion:, ,

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN02
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: At least one measurable lesion at baseline by Computed tomography (CT) or Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) as per

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN03
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Biopsies: Subjects in the melanoma cohort must have at least 1 tumor site that can be biopsied at acceptable clinical risk

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN06
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: >=2000/µL, >=1500/µL, >= 100x1000/µL, >= 8.5 g/dL, <= 1.5 X upper limit of normal (ULN) mL/min, and <= 3x ULN

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN07
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Normal or be on stable hormone supplementation

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: IN08
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Participation in any prior clinical study with BMS-936558 or ipilimumab that has overall survival listed as a primary/co-primary endpoint

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: EX02
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Subjects with active autoimmune disease, uncontrolled or significant cardiovascular disease

eligibilityCriterionItems.name: EX03
eligibilityCriterionItems.text: Prior therapy with anti- Cytotoxic T-Lymphocyte Antigen 4 (CTLA4) antibody or anti- Killer cell immunoglobulin-like receptor (KIR) antibody
